description: HubSpot CRM v3 read and write access. Lists, searches, fetches, creates, updates, and archives contacts, companies, deals, and tickets. Lists contact lists and members, CRM owners, and per-object properties. Exposes a raw hubspot_request action for any CRM v3 endpoint bounded by the same host allowlist. Authenticated with a HubSpot access token (Private App or Service Key) presented as a Bearer header against api.hubapi.com.

static_token.instructions: Create a HubSpot Service Key (or Private App access token; both produce a long-lived bearer token sent as Authorization: Bearer pat-...). Grant the CRM read+write scopes required by this tool: crm.objects.contacts.read, crm.objects.contacts.write, crm.objects.companies.read, crm.objects.companies.write, crm.objects.deals.read, crm.objects.deals.write, crm.objects.line_items.read, crm.objects.owners.read, crm.lists.read, crm.schemas.contacts.read, crm.schemas.companies.read, crm.schemas.deals.read, and tickets (the legacy bare scope that covers ticket read and write). Copy the key value once; the token is long-lived and does not expire unless rotated.

auth.instructions:
1. Open HubSpot, navigate to the Developer section, choose Service Keys (preferred) or Legacy Apps -> Private Apps. Click Create.
2. Name the key (e.g. Ironclaw). Add scopes:
   - crm.objects.contacts.read
   - crm.objects.contacts.write
   - crm.objects.companies.read
   - crm.objects.companies.write
   - crm.objects.deals.read
   - crm.objects.deals.write
   - crm.objects.line_items.read
   - crm.objects.owners.read
   - crm.lists.read
   - crm.schemas.contacts.read
   - crm.schemas.companies.read
   - crm.schemas.deals.read
   - tickets
3. Create the key and copy the value (format: pat-na3-...). HubSpot will not display it again in full.
4. On the IronClaw host, set:

   ```sh
   export HUBSPOT_PRIVATE_APP_TOKEN=<the key>
   ```

   Or run `ironclaw tool setup hubspot-tool` to prompt for the value interactively and store it via the encrypted secrets store.
5. Run `ironclaw tool install ~/VScode/ironhub/tools/hubspot --skip-build` to register the tool. Re-authentication is only required if the key is rotated or revoked.
6. The HubSpot Search API is rate-limited to approximately 5 requests per second. Sequential search calls are recommended; bursts may return HTTP 429.

required_secrets.name: hubspot_private_app_token
required_secrets.prompt: HubSpot Private App access token (or Service Key). Format: pat-na...
